pageTitle: Square Feet to Cubic Yards Calculator
pageDescription: Convert square feet to cubic yards for concrete, soil, and other materials in construction and landscaping projects

formula.title: Conversion Formula
formula.description: Cubic Yards = (Area × Depth) ÷ 27, where 27 cubic feet = 1 cubic yard

applications.title: Common Applications
applications.description: Concrete ordering, soil delivery, mulch coverage, and material estimation

accuracy.title: Accuracy Factors
accuracy.description: Actual requirements may vary due to compaction, settling, and measurement accuracy

criticalWarningsList.ordering: Order additional material to account for variations and spills

importantNotesList: Always add 5-10% extra for waste and variations in actual projects
Consider material compaction and settling in final calculations
Verify local supplier minimum order quantities
Measure twice and order once to avoid shortages

messages.enterInformation: Enter your area and depth to calculate material volume
messages.resultMessage: Your volume calculation is shown below
messages.conversionAnalysis: Square Feet to Cubic Yards Analysis

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides volume estimates for construction materials. Actual requirements may vary due to compaction, settling, measurement accuracy, and project-specific factors. Always consult with suppliers for final ordering quantities.

seekHelp.title: Construction Resources
seekHelp.content: For professional construction estimation and material planning, consult certified contractors or use specialized estimating software for project-specific requirements and local conditions.

errors.area: Please enter a valid area in square feet
errors.depth: Please enter a valid depth or height
errors.wasteFactor: Please enter a valid waste factor (0-50%)

tooltips.area: Total surface area to be covered
tooltips.depth: Thickness or depth of material required
tooltips.materialType: Type of material affects density and handling
tooltips.wasteFactor: Additional percentage to account for waste and variations

enter_area_and_depth_measurements_to_cal: Enter area and depth measurements to calculate volume in cubic yards
enter_area_and_depth_to_see_29: Enter area and depth to see
understanding_square_feet_to_cubic_yards: Understanding Square Feet to Cubic Yards Conversion
convert_depth_to_feet_depthft_depthin_12: Convert depth to feet: depth_ft = depth_in ÷ 12
convert_to_cubic_yards_cubicyd_cubicft_2: Convert to cubic yards: cubic_yd = cubic_ft ÷ 27
calculate_needed_for_slabs_driveways_and: Calculate needed for slabs, driveways, and foundations
estimate_mulch_soil_or_gravel_for_garden: Estimate mulch, soil, or gravel for garden beds
determine_material_quantities_for_excava: Determine material quantities for excavation projects
